Popover

Contextual overlay container using <lyte-popover> Slyte DOM. Displays supplementary content anchored to a trigger element with an arrow caret.

Overlay Figma Synced 4 Positions × 3 Alignments
Basic Popover — Body Only
Bottom (default)
Top
HTML
<!-- Basic Popover — Bottom -->
<button id="pop-trigger">Trigger</button>
<lyte-popover lt-prop-show="true"
              lt-prop-type="callout"
              lt-prop-placement="bottom"
              lt-prop-origin-elem="#pop-trigger">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="popover">
    <lyte-popover-content>
      <p>Popover body text.</p>
    </lyte-popover-content>
  </template>
</lyte-popover>

<!-- Top placement -->
<lyte-popover lt-prop-show="true"
              lt-prop-type="callout"
              lt-prop-placement="top"
              lt-prop-origin-elem="#trigger2">
  ...
</lyte-popover>
SCSS
/* lyte-popover renders: .popoverWrapper > .lytePopover > .lytePopoverArrow + content */
lyte-popover .lytePopover {
    background: var(--zc-color-black-white-surface-white-surface, #FFFFFF);
    border: 1px solid var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-default, #E4E5E8);
    border-radius: var(--zc-radius-rl, 8px);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
    font-family: 'ZohoPuvi', sans-serif;
}
.zc-popover-body {
    font-size: var(--zc-p2-font-size, 14px);
    color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-secondary, #696C74);
    line-height: 20px;
}
Popover with Title & Body
Bottom
Right
Left
HTML
<!-- Popover with Title & Body — Bottom -->
<button id="pop-trigger">Hover me</button>
<lyte-popover lt-prop-show="true"
              lt-prop-type="callout"
              lt-prop-placement="bottom"
              lt-prop-origin-elem="#pop-trigger">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="popover">
    <lyte-popover-header>Popover Title</lyte-popover-header>
    <lyte-popover-content>
      <p>Descriptive body text.</p>
    </lyte-popover-content>
  </template>
</lyte-popover>
SCSS
lyte-popover lyte-popover-header {
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: var(--zc-p2-font-weight-semibold, 600);
    color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-default, #37383C);
    line-height: 22px;
}
.zc-popover-body {
    font-size: var(--zc-p2-font-size, 14px);
    color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-secondary, #696C74);
    line-height: 20px;
}
Popover with Title, Body & Action Buttons
Bottom
Top
Right
HTML
<!-- Popover with Actions — Bottom -->
<button id="pop-trigger">Click me</button>
<lyte-popover lt-prop-show="true"
              lt-prop-type="callout"
              lt-prop-placement="bottom"
              lt-prop-origin-elem="#pop-trigger">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="popover">
    <lyte-popover-header>Confirm Action</lyte-popover-header>
    <lyte-popover-content>
      <p>Are you sure you want to proceed?</p>
    </lyte-popover-content>
    <lyte-popover-footer>
      <button class="zc-popover-btn zc-popover-btn-secondary">Cancel</button>
      <button class="zc-popover-btn zc-popover-btn-primary">Confirm</button>
    </lyte-popover-footer>
  </template>
</lyte-popover>
SCSS
lyte-popover-footer .zc-popover-actions {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    gap: 8px;
    padding: 8px 16px 12px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-default, #E4E5E8);
}
.zc-popover-btn {
    padding: 6px 16px;
    border-radius: var(--zc-radius-rs, 6px);
    font-size: var(--zc-p2-font-size, 14px);
    font-weight: var(--zc-p2-font-weight-semibold, 600);
}
.zc-popover-btn-secondary {
    background: var(--zc-color-black-white-surface-white-surface, #FFFFFF);
    color: var(--zc-color-neutral-text-neutral-text-default, #37383C);
    border-color: var(--zc-color-neutral-border-neutral-border-default, #E4E5E8);
}
.zc-popover-btn-primary {
    background: var(--zc-color-primary-surface-primary-surface-default, #2D62ED);
    color: var(--zc-color-black-white-text-white-text, #FFFFFF);
}
All 12 Placements — Position × Alignment
Top Start
Trigger
Popover
Top Center
Trigger
Popover
Top End
Trigger
Popover
Bottom Start
Trigger
Popover
Bottom Center
Trigger
Popover
Bottom End
Trigger
Popover

Trigger
Popover
Left Center
Trigger
Popover
Left End
Trigger
Popover
Right Start
Trigger
Popover
Right Center
Trigger
Popover
Right End
Trigger
Popover
HTML
<!-- lyte-popover supports lt-prop-placement: top | bottom | left | right -->

<!-- Example: Bottom -->
<button id="trigger">Trigger</button>
<lyte-popover lt-prop-show="true"
              lt-prop-type="callout"
              lt-prop-placement="bottom"
              lt-prop-origin-elem="#trigger">
  <template is="registerYield" yield-name="popover">
    <lyte-popover-content>
      <p>Bottom popover</p>
    </lyte-popover-content>
  </template>
</lyte-popover>

<!-- Example: Top -->
<lyte-popover lt-prop-placement="top" ...>...</lyte-popover>

<!-- Example: Left -->
<lyte-popover lt-prop-placement="left" ...>...</lyte-popover>

<!-- Example: Right -->
<lyte-popover lt-prop-placement="right" ...>...</lyte-popover>
